category_sources: Official pandemics.gitlab.io homepage describes Pandemics as converting Markdown manuscripts into submission-ready documents using pandoc.
source_facts.description says it converts Markdown documents in a simplified framework.
display_name_sources: Official pandemics.gitlab.io homepage heading is Pandemics.
docs_sources: Official pandemics.gitlab.io site provides Install, Get started, Write, Style, and Share documentation sections.
repo_sources: Official pandemics.gitlab.io homepage includes a 'Find on Gitlab' link to gitlab.com/pandemics.
source_facts.repo is empty, so the official homepage GitLab link was used.
tags_sources: Official pandemics.gitlab.io homepage says it manages templates and converts Markdown manuscripts with pandoc.
